headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Xcel Energy, Lowers Price Target to $92
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $95 to $92.
